mapper.sql: id, city_code, city_name, name, category, district, address, latitude, longitude, open_time, close_time, closed_weekdays, temporarily_closed, status_note, status_source, status_updated_at, avg_cost, stay_duration, indoor, night_available, rain_friendly, walking_level, tags, suitable_for, description, priority_score, crowd_penalty
mapper.select:
select
from poi
name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select count(1) from poi
name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')

select
from poi
temporarily_closed = 0
and (city_code = #{cityCode} or (city_code is null and (#{cityCode} = 'CD' or #{cityCode} = 'cd')))
and (city_name = #{cityName} or (city_name is null and #{cityName} = '成都'))
and (indoor = 1 or rain_friendly = 1)
and ( case when lower(walking_level) = 'low' or walking_level = '低' then 1 when lower(walking_level) = 'high' or walking_level = '高' then 3 else 2 end ) <= ( case when lower(#{walkingLevel}) = 'low' or #{walkingLevel} = '低' then 2 when lower(#{walkingLevel}) = 'high' or #{walkingLevel} = '高' then 4 else 3 end )
order by priority_score desc, status_updated_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into poi ( city_code, city_name, name, category, district, address, latitude, longitude, open_time, close_time, closed_weekdays, temporarily_closed, status_note, status_source, status_updated_at, avg_cost, stay_duration, indoor, night_available, rain_friendly, walking_level, tags, suitable_for, description, priority_score, crowd_penalty ) values ( #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{name}, #{category}, #{district}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{closedWeekdays}, #{temporarilyClosed}, #{statusNote}, #{statusSource}, #{statusUpdatedAt}, #{avgCost}, #{stayDuration}, #{indoor}, #{nightAvailable}, #{rainFriendly}, #{walkingLevel}, #{tags}, #{suitableFor}, #{description}, #{priorityScore}, #{crowdPenalty} )
mapper.update: update poi set city_code = #{cityCode}, city_name = #{cityName}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, district = #{district}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, closed_weekdays = #{closedWeekdays}, temporarily_closed = #{temporarilyClosed}, status_note = #{statusNote}, status_source = #{statusSource}, status_updated_at = #{statusUpdatedAt}, avg_cost = #{avgCost}, stay_duration = #{stayDuration}, indoor = #{indoor}, night_available = #{nightAvailable}, rain_friendly = #{rainFriendly}, walking_level = #{walkingLevel}, tags = #{tags}, suitable_for = #{suitableFor}, description = #{description}, priority_score = #{priorityScore}, crowd_penalty = #{crowdPenalty} where id = #{id}
